# Work Packet ALB-018 — Image-Read Interception Hook

## 1. TASK

The sixth hook: intercept GLM-5.2's `Read` of image files and deliver a GLM-4.6V description instead of raw image content — the model must never receive raw image bytes it may mishandle.

## 2. EXPECTED OUTCOME

- `plugin/scripts/image-read-intercept.sh` — the hook.
- `plugin/hooks/hooks.json` — sixth entry wired (PreToolUse, matcher `Read`).
- `plugin/scripts/verify-hooks.sh` — extended to exercise the new hook (trigger + no-op payloads).
- `tests/test_image_hook.sh` — hermetic tests.
- `tests/fixtures/hooks/synthetic/PreToolUse-read.jsonl` — synthetic payloads (or extend the existing synthetic PreToolUse file if the validator prefers; keep the fixture validator green).

## 3. CONTEXT

- **Read first:** `plugin/scripts/pre-tool-guard.sh` (the existing PreToolUse hook — reuse its payload-parsing and JSON-emission idioms), `plugin/hooks/hooks.json`, `plugin/scripts/verify-hooks.sh`, `bin/albion-vision --help` + its source header (CLI contract), `tests/fixtures/hooks/captured/PreToolUse.jsonl` (real payload shape: `tool_name`, `tool_input.file_path`), `CONVENTIONS.md`.
- **Channel decision (locked — do not deviate):** deliver via `permissionDecision: "deny"` with the content in `permissionDecisionReason` — the only interception channel verified on the wire in this repo (M2 guard; works even in bypassPermissions). Do NOT use `updatedToolOutput`, `updatedInput`, or any field not already proven by this repo's captured payloads. The reason text reaches the model; that is the delivery vehicle.
- **Behavior:**
  - `Read` whose `file_path` ends in `.png/.jpg/.jpeg` (case-insensitive) → run `bin/albion-vision <path>` (locate via the hook's own resolved repo root; honor `ALBION_VISION_BIN` override for tests). Success → deny with reason: `Image read intercepted. Vision description of <path>: <description>` plus one line noting the raw image was not loaded.
  - Other image extensions (`.gif/.webp/.bmp/.tiff/.svg`) → deny with a factual note: vision subsystem cannot describe this type; do not guess its content.
  - Vision call fails or CLI missing → deny with the factual degrade note: `no vision provider available for <path>; do not guess image content`. (Fail-closed for image bytes, fail-open for session flow: always exit 0 with valid JSON.)
  - Non-image `Read`, other tools, malformed stdin → emit nothing, exit 0 (strict no-op; same discipline as the guard).
- **Timeout:** give the hooks.json entry an explicit generous timeout (the vision call may take tens of seconds); the CLI's own `--max-time 120` bounds it. Cap the description at 4,000 characters with a truncation marker (deny reasons must stay well under payload limits).

## 4. MUST DO

- Token hygiene: the hook inherits the session env; it must never echo token values in any output or log (`${ALBION_IMAGE_LOG:-/dev/null}` for diagnostics).
- `tests/test_image_hook.sh`, wired into `bash tests/run.sh`, with a stub `ALBION_VISION_BIN`: png/jpg/jpeg payloads → deny JSON containing the stub description; `.py`/extensionless reads → no output; `.gif` → unsupported-type note; stub failure → degrade note; oversized stub description → truncated under the cap; malformed stdin → exit 0 silent; every emitted line parses as JSON.
- `verify-hooks.sh`: one trigger payload (image read → deny-shaped JSON with vision/degrade note) and one no-op payload (non-image read → empty), consistent with its existing per-hook pattern; hook count message goes 5 → 6.
- Keep `tests/test_hooks_wiring.sh` green (it validates hooks.json structure; if its assertions hard-code the hook count, that file is explicitly sanctioned for that minimal update — nothing else in it).
- CI-equivalent shellcheck clean; run the full suite yourself before finishing.

## 5. MUST NOT DO

- Do NOT touch the other five hook scripts, `bin/albion-vision`, the doctor, skills, agents, `manifest/`, or the state engine.
- Do NOT make live network calls anywhere in tests or verify-hooks (stub the vision binary).
- Do NOT invent hook-output fields beyond those used by the existing hooks.
- Do NOT modify anything outside the sanctioned paths. If an out-of-scope test breaks, STOP and report.
- Do NOT run git state-changing commands.

## 6. TOOLS ALLOWED

File creation/editing and shell execution within the repository workspace only.

## 7. SUCCESS CRITERIA

- [ ] `bash tests/run.sh` fully green including `test_image_hook.sh`.
- [ ] `verify-hooks.sh` exercises 6 hooks and passes; `bin/albion-doctor --offline` hook-suite stays PASS.
- [ ] Image reads are denied with description/degrade notes; non-image reads are untouched no-ops.
- [ ] CI-equivalent shellcheck clean; `git status` scoped to sanctioned paths.
